g.text: Clarion — routing a spoken 'redirect to another page' request
◀ ─ ─ EVENT SEAM — non-blocking call, not a nested loop ─ ─ ▶
'I'm about to use <link>. Say yes to continue.'
the reasoner can return `read` instead of `navigate`/`click` — then it never reaches the gate, just reads the link back and the page doesn't move.
blue = Voice plane · green = Task plane · amber = consent decision
purple = actuator / transport · red = known gap
